questions.question: Describe the different types of user interface (UI) components used in mobile application development. (5 marks)
questions.hint: UI components include buttons, text fields, labels, etc.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'manifest' file in a mobile application, and what information does it contain? (5 marks)
questions.hint: The manifest file contains application metadata, permissions, and other necessary information.

questions.question: Explain the concept of 'responsive design' in mobile application development and how it relates to user experience. (10 marks)
questions.hint: Responsive design involves creating an application that adapts to different screen sizes and devices, providing a consistent user experience.
